CustomField.description: The Apex class name that implements this action's logic. Must extend BaseAgentAction and implement executeAction(). Used by CapabilityExecutionService to instantiate the handler at runtime.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Apex class name without namespace prefix. Must extend BaseAgentAction. Examples: ActionCreateRecord, ActionUpdateRecord, ActionFlowHandler. Used by the framework to instantiate and execute this action.
CustomField.label: Handler Class Name
